title: limniris prismatica
intro: Limniris prismatica, also known as the mountain iris or sea daffodil, is a species of flowering plant in the iris family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Limniris prismatica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Limniris prismatica can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for use in treating various health conditions.
